en: A unit's overall power level. Levels increase when enough EXP is gained.
Progress toward the next level. Enemy units always display 0 EXP.
Current HP out of max HP. Units are defeated when HP reaches 0.
Current MP out of max MP. Skills require enough MP to cast.
Base attack power before target mitigation. Specific combat previews show the exact resulting damage.
The unit's currently equipped weapon or implement.
Magic supports magical damage and contributes to max MP.
Resistance reduces incoming magical damage, improves healing, and contributes to max MP.
Speed affects combat tempo and follow-up potential.
Luck supports accuracy, consistency, and resistance to enemy crits depending on the formula in use.
Movement determines how many tiles the unit can travel in a turn.
The unit's currently available basic attack range with equipped gear.
